title: selago praetermissa
intro: Selago praetermissa is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Selago praetermissa include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, Selago praetermissa is often used as a tincture or infusion, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
